_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: AU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: AU Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after AU Stage B precision guards

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: where data is processed by Nuvama Cirrus Pte Ltd (Singapore) and KauriWorks Ltd (NZ)
we do not require copies of government IDs for onboarding where a certified alternate is sighted
we will verify identity using internal tokens only
no dealing by directors or employees from quarter-end until the AUSE release of Appendix 4C/Appendix 4D, and from financial year-end until the Preliminary Final Report
analyst/press briefings must use only publicly available information
cleansing notices are lodged before resumption where applicable
if confidentiality is lost, disclosure is “immediate”

must_not_detect.reason: Defined exchange acronym; not PII/MNPI content
Role noun/defined role, not an individual's name by itself
Negated context; do not label as material_adverse_change per rule

uncertain.reason: Likely a personal expense-card identifier but not clearly mapped to an allowed rule beyond a broad account number
Privacy-by-design control relevant to minimisation/identifiability but not explicitly covered by allowed rules
References the OAIC notifiable data breach framework; not directly mapped to allowed rules
Access/correction rights are privacy-event markers but no explicit allowed rule except consent withdrawal
Indicates consent basis for overseas disclosures; only withdrawal marker is explicitly allowed
